## Checklist

Before submitting this pull request, confirm:

```text
[ ] The change has a clear purpose.
[ ] The files are in the correct repository.
[ ] The file and folder names follow project standards.
[ ] The documentation is clear.
[ ] No secrets are committed.
[ ] No unsupported company-specific claims are included.
[ ] No deployment was performed unless clearly documented.
[ ] GitHub-first project strategy is respected.
[ ] Security impact was considered.
[ ] Rollback or recovery notes are included where needed.
[ ] Related documents were updated where needed.
```
